Hong Zi ејҳе’Ё
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hong Zi (ејҳе’Ё)was born in Danyang. Admired Zhuge Jin and recommended him to Sun Quan. Married Sun QuanвҖҷs sister. Hong Zi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
